utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Each one is fully specified: destination (Athens, Greece), travel_dates (September 15–19, 2024), transportation (flight details with cost and local transport), accommodation (hotel name, type, room type, nights, cost), activities (two specified with providers and costs), additional_services (listed with costs), and total_budget (€850). All details required are present and complete.
